term_json: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Alliteration"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Alliteration repeats the same consonant sound at the start of nearby words to create rhythm or emphasis."}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Example: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Often used to make a line feel musical or memorable."}]}]}]}]}

{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Enjambment"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Enjambment happens when a sentence or phrase continues past the end of a poetic line without a hard stop."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"It pulls the reader forward into the next line before the thought fully lands."}]}]},{"type":"orderedList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Creates motion"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Delays closure"}]}]}]}]}

{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Metaphor"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A metaphor compares two unlike things without using like or as."},{"type":"text","text":" Learn more.","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://www.poetryfoundation.org/learn/glossary-terms/metaphor","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","class":null}}]}]}]}

{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Meter"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Meter describes a repeating rhythmic pattern in a line of poetry."}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"da-DUM da-DUM da-DUM"}]}]}
